title: aspidium elongatum
intro: Aspidium elongatum, also known as the Elongated Lady Fern, is a type of fern plant belonging to the Dryopteris genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aspidium elongatum include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption and utilization of its medicinal properties.
